payload.author: codex
payload.body: Repro evidence: scope --json remote show => url:null/project:null; scope sync => remote hub URL is required; http://localhost:4321/api/meta => remote:null and remoteLink:null for /Users/bri/dev/Scope. With no .scope/remote.json or env remote/key, scope serve does not start startRemoteSync for this workspace, so task event logs remain local/git-only.
